title: Create: Factory
description: 🍬 A lot of new foods added to Create!
body:
![Create: Factory logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f1c30dcdb38cd71f3500efa43f6dc3053f2a085.png)

## Create: Factory is compatible with Create 0.6!

**Create: Factory** is an addon for the Create mod that adds a lot of Create related foods to the game, including rolls, waffles and apples!

This mod requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create). You can also install [Create: Confectionery](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-confectionery) and [Ecologics](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecologics) to access more recipes.

--> In 1.18.2, you have to install [Ecologics](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecologics) and [Create: Confectionery](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-confectionery)

---
You can use it in your modpack :)

---

**Thank you for over 500k downloads!!**
